focus_points.label: Celebrating the payments refactor win
focus_points.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor. It's worth acknowledging the team's recognition and impact of this work.

focus_points.label: Assessing motivation and engagement
focus_points.reason: Looks a bit flat this week and quieter than usual. Could be a temporary dip or something more — worth exploring.

focus_points.label: Interest in mentoring opportunities
focus_points.reason: Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring. This hasn't been discussed in a while — worth revisiting.

focus_points.label: Upcoming billing rewrite involvement
focus_points.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite. Clarifying their role and expectations here is important.

focus_points.label: Any obstacles affecting current work
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in topic. It's good to ensure there are no hidden blockers impacting their pace.

bank.label: Celebrating success
bank.name: How did you feel about the team's response to the payments refactor launch?
bank.description: Explores the emotional impact of the recent project success and team recognition.

bank.label: Energy check-in
bank.name: What has contributed to the quieter vibe you've been experiencing this week?
bank.description: Seeks to understand the reasons behind a potential dip in motivation or energy.

bank.label: Mentoring discussions
bank.name: What specific areas of mentoring are you most interested in pursuing right now?
bank.description: Probes the employee's current interests in mentoring and how they envision contributing.

bank.label: Upcoming project role
bank.name: What do you need to know about the billing rewrite to feel prepared for your role?
bank.description: Clarifies expectations and support needed for the upcoming billing rewrite project.

bank.label: Identifying blockers
bank.name: Are there any current obstacles that you feel are slowing down your work?
bank.description: Encourages the employee to identify and discuss potential blockers affecting progress.

bank.label: Team impact assessment
bank.name: How do you think the payments refactor has changed our team's dynamics?
bank.description: Explores the impact of the project on team collaboration and morale.

bank.label: Feedback on growth
bank.name: What feedback have you received that has helped you in your growth recently?
bank.description: Encourages reflection on recent feedback that has influenced their development.

bank.label: Future aspirations
bank.name: How do you see your role evolving in the upcoming billing rewrite?
bank.description: Explores the employee's vision for their future contributions and responsibilities.

bank.label: Recognizing achievements
bank.name: How did you feel about the team's recognition of the payments refactor win?
bank.description: Explores the emotional impact and sense of achievement from the recent project.

bank.label: Assessing energy levels
bank.name: What specifically has felt different for you this week compared to previous weeks?
bank.description: Encourages reflection on changes in energy and engagement levels.

bank.label: Mentoring interest
bank.name: What kind of mentoring opportunities are you most interested in pursuing right now?
bank.description: Gathers insight into specific areas for growth and development.

bank.label: Clarifying roles
bank.name: What are your thoughts on your involvement in the upcoming billing rewrite?
bank.description: Seeks clarity on expectations and role in future projects.

bank.label: Identifying blockers
bank.name: Are there any current obstacles that are impacting your work this week?
bank.description: Probes for hidden challenges that might be affecting performance.

bank.label: Feedback on current work
bank.name: What feedback have you received on your recent work that stood out to you?
bank.description: Encourages discussion of feedback received post-refactor.

bank.label: Team dynamics
bank.name: How do you feel the team is responding to the recent changes and wins?
bank.description: Explores team morale and engagement in light of the recent project completion.

bank.label: Future learning
bank.name: What skills do you feel you need to develop further for the billing rewrite?
bank.description: Identifies areas for professional development linked to upcoming work.
